notes.subject: Computational Physics
notes.title: How to Simulate Physics Without Crying
notes.subtitle: A survival guide to numerical methods, ODEs, and when to just trust the solver
notes.teaser: Notes from the trenches of learning computational physics — covering numerical integration, stability nightmares, and the dark arts of making simulations actually converge. The first draft of this was made as a companion to a talk I gave at the Coding Club of IISER Tirupati.
